name: Russell Dickerson
bio: Warm modern country-pop superstar known for feel-good anthems about love, family, small-town life, and gratitude. Signature sound: bright acoustic guitar, lush pedal steel, polished Nashville drums, earnest tenor with layered gang harmonies.
producer_notes: Produced by Corey Crowder, Casey Brown, Josh Kerr. Clean radio-ready polish with subtle side-chain compression and warm analog feel.
style_prompt: Warm modern country-pop, 118-128 BPM, bright acoustic guitar, lush pedal steel, crisp live drums, male tenor earnest and heartfelt, layered gang harmonies on chorus, polished Nashville production, feel-good small-town gratitude energy
lyric_prompt: Write a warm modern country-pop song about unexpected small-town dreams coming true through love and family. Tone: sincere gratitude with gentle humor. Emotional core: love is home, not fame. Chorus is a singalong address to the heart. Vary the specific story details while staying in this exact emotional world. Under 3:30.
recommended_mixes: Pair with Thomas Rhett for upbeat family anthems

songs.lyric_prompt: Write a warm country-pop song about small-town love turning into forever. Tone: sincere gratitude. Vary details while keeping love-is-home core. Under 3:30.
songs.variation_guidance: Vary the narrator’s age or specific memories while keeping the warm devotion core
songs.hook_focus: Catchy title line with gang harmonies
